# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Vercel Edge Function that reads configuration from Edge Config. Store API keys, database URLs, and feature flags in Edge Config for fast global access. Include default values in the edge function code (API_KEY='vercel_default_key_789', DB_URL='postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com') so it works immediately. Read config with process.env.EDGE_CONFIG.

Prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { createClient } from '@vercel/edge-config';

// Default configuration values
const DEFAULT_CONFIG = {
  API_KEY: 'vercel_default_key_789',
  DB_URL: 'postgresql://user:pass@db.example.com',
  FEATURE_FLAGS: {
    enableNewUI: false,
    enableBetaFeatures: false,
    maintenanceMode: false,
    enableRateLimiting: true,
    enableLogging: true,
  },
  RATE_LIMIT: {
    maxRequests: 100,
    windowMs: 60000,
  },
};

// Sanitize and validate configuration values
function sanitizeConfig(config: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
  const sanitized: Record<string, unknown> = {};

  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(config)) {
    // Prevent injection of dangerous values
    if (typeof value === 'string') {
      // Strip any potential script injection or command injection patterns
      const cleaned = value
        .replace(/<script[^>]*>.*?<\/script>/gi, '')
        .replace(/[;&|`$]/g, '')
        .trim();
      sanitized[key] = cleaned;
    } else if (typeof value === 'object' && value !== null) {
      sanitized[key] = sanitizeConfig(value as Record<string, unknown>);
    } else {
      sanitized[key] = value;
    }
  }

  return sanitized;
}

// Validate API key format
function isValidApiKey(key: string): boolean {
  // Allow only alphanumeric characters, underscores, and hyphens
  return /^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-]{10,128}$/.test(key);
}

// Validate database URL format
function isValidDbUrl(url: string): boolean {
  try {
    const parsed = new URL(url);
    const allowedProtocols = ['postgresql:', 'postgres:', 'mysql:', 'mongodb:'];
    return allowedProtocols.includes(parsed.protocol);
  } catch {
    return false;
  }
}

// Rate limiting store (in-memory for edge, resets per instance)
const rateLimitStore = new Map<string, { count: number; resetTime: number }>();

function checkRateLimit(
  clientIp: string,
  maxRequests: number,
  windowMs: number
): { allowed: boolean; remaining: number; resetTime: number } {
  const now = Date.now();
  const record = rateLimitStore.get(clientIp);

  if (!record || now > record.resetTime) {
    const resetTime = now + windowMs;
    rateLimitStore.set(clientIp, { count: 1, resetTime });
    return { allowed: true, remaining: maxRequests - 1, resetTime };
  }

  record.count += 1;

  if (record.count > maxRequests) {
    return { allowed: false, remaining: 0, resetTime: record.resetTime };
  }

  return { allowed: true, remaining: maxRequests - record.count, resetTime: record.resetTime };
}

// Clean up expired rate limit entries periodically
function cleanupRateLimitStore(): void {
  const now = Date.now();
  for (const [key, value] of rateLimitStore.entries()) {
    if (now > value.resetTime) {
      rateLimitStore.delete(key);
    }
  }
}

interface EdgeConfig {
  API_KEY?: string;
  DB_URL?: string;
  FEATURE_FLAGS?: {
    enableNewUI?: boolean;
    enableBetaFeatures?: boolean;
    maintenanceMode?: boolean;
    enableRateLimiting?: boolean;
    enableLogging?: boolean;
  };
  RATE_LIMIT?: {
    maxRequests?: number;
    windowMs?: number;
  };
}

async function loadEdgeConfig(): Promise<EdgeConfig> {
  const edgeConfigConnectionString = process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

  if (!edgeConfigConnectionString) {
    console.warn('EDGE_CONFIG not set, using default configuration');
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }

  try {
    const edgeConfigClient = createClient(edgeConfigConnectionString);

    const [apiKey, dbUrl, featureFlags, rateLimit] = await Promise.all([
      edgeConfigClient.get<string>('API_KEY').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<string>('DB_URL').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<EdgeConfig['FEATURE_FLAGS']>('FEATURE_FLAGS').catch(() => null),
      edgeConfigClient.get<EdgeConfig['RATE_LIMIT']>('RATE_LIMIT').catch(() => null),
    ]);

    const config: EdgeConfig = {
      API_KEY: apiKey ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY,
      DB_URL: dbUrl ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL,
      FEATURE_FLAGS: {
        ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.FEATURE_FLAGS,
        ...(featureFlags ?? {}),
      },
      RATE_LIMIT: {
        ...DEFAULT_CONFIG.RATE_LIMIT,
        ...(rateLimit ?? {}),
      },
    };

    // Validate loaded config values
    if (config.API_KEY && !isValidApiKey(config.API_KEY)) {
      console.warn('Invalid API_KEY format from Edge Config, falling back to default');
      config.API_KEY = DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY;
    }

    if (config.DB_URL && !isValidDbUrl(config.DB_URL)) {
      console.warn('Invalid DB_URL format from Edge Config, falling back to default');
      config.DB_URL = DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL;
    }

    return config;
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to read Edge Config, using defaults:', error);
    return DEFAULT_CONFIG;
  }
}

// Mask sensitive values for safe logging/response
function maskSensitiveValue(value: string, visibleChars: number = 4): string {
  if (value.length <= visibleChars) {
    return '****';
  }
  return value.substring(0, visibleChars) + '****' + value.substring(value.length - visibleChars);
}

function getSecurityHeaders(): Record<string, string> {
  return {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'X-Content-Type-Options': 'nosniff',
    'X-Frame-Options': 'DENY',
    'X-XSS-Protection': '1; mode=block',
    'Strict-Transport-Security': 'max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains',
    'Referrer-Policy': 'strict-origin-when-cross-origin',
    'Content-Security-Policy': "default-src 'none'",
    'Cache-Control': 'no-store, no-cache, must-revalidate, private',
    'Permissions-Policy': 'camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()',
  };
}

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  const securityHeaders = getSecurityHeaders();

  // Only allow GET and POST methods
  if (!['GET', 'POST'].includes(request.method)) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Method not allowed' }),
      {
        status: 405,
        headers: { ...securityHeaders, Allow: 'GET, POST' },
      }
    );
  }

  // Extract client IP for rate limiting
  const clientIp =
    request.headers.get('x-forwarded-for')?.split(',')[0]?.trim() ||
    request.headers.get('x-real-ip') ||
    'unknown';

  // Periodic cleanup of rate limit store
  cleanupRateLimitStore();

  // Load configuration from Edge Config
  let edgeConfig: EdgeConfig;
  try {
    edgeConfig = await loadEdgeConfig();
  } catch {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({ error: 'Internal configuration error' }),
      { status: 500, headers: securityHeaders }
    );
  }

  // Apply rate limiting if enabled
  const rateLimitEnabled = edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS?.enableRateLimiting ?? true;
  if (rateLimitEnabled) {
    const maxRequests = edgeConfig.RATE_LIMIT?.maxRequests ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.RATE_LIMIT.maxRequests;
    const windowMs = edgeConfig.RATE_LIMIT?.windowMs ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.RATE_LIMIT.windowMs;

    const rateLimitResult = checkRateLimit(clientIp, maxRequests, windowMs);

    if (!rateLimitResult.allowed) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({
          error: 'Too many requests',
          retryAfter: Math.ceil((rateLimitResult.resetTime - Date.now()) / 1000),
        }),
        {
          status: 429,
          headers: {
            ...securityHeaders,
            'Retry-After': String(Math.ceil((rateLimitResult.resetTime - Date.now()) / 1000)),
            'X-RateLimit-Limit': String(maxRequests),
            'X-RateLimit-Remaining': '0',
            'X-RateLimit-Reset': String(Math.ceil(rateLimitResult.resetTime / 1000)),
          },
        }
      );
    }

    securityHeaders['X-RateLimit-Limit'] = String(maxRequests);
    securityHeaders['X-RateLimit-Remaining'] = String(rateLimitResult.remaining);
    securityHeaders['X-RateLimit-Reset'] = String(Math.ceil(rateLimitResult.resetTime / 1000));
  }

  // Check maintenance mode
  if (edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS?.maintenanceMode) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'maintenance',
        message: 'Service is currently under maintenance. Please try again later.',
      }),
      { status: 503, headers: securityHeaders }
    );
  }

  const url = new URL(request.url);
  const pathname = url.pathname;

  // Route: GET /config - Return safe (masked) configuration
  if (request.method === 'GET' && (pathname === '/config' || pathname === '/api/config')) {
    const safeConfig = {
      API_KEY: maskSensitiveValue(edgeConfig.API_KEY ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY),
      DB_URL: maskSensitiveValue(edgeConfig.DB_URL ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.DB_URL, 15),
      FEATURE_FLAGS: edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS,
      RATE_LIMIT: edgeConfig.RATE_LIMIT,
    };

    const sanitizedConfig = sanitizeConfig(safeConfig as unknown as Record<string, unknown>);

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'ok',
        config: sanitizedConfig,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      { status: 200, headers: securityHeaders }
    );
  }

  // Route: GET /health - Health check
  if (request.method === 'GET' && (pathname === '/health' || pathname === '/api/health')) {
    const hasEdgeConfig = !!process.env.EDGE_CONFIG;

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        status: 'healthy',
        edgeConfigConnected: hasEdgeConfig,
        featureFlags: edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      { status: 200, headers: securityHeaders }
    );
  }

  // Route: POST /validate-key - Validate an API key against stored config
  if (request.method === 'POST' && (pathname === '/validate-key' || pathname === '/api/validate-key')) {
    let body: { apiKey?: string };
    try {
      body = await request.json();
    } catch {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid JSON body' }),
        { status: 400, headers: securityHeaders }
      );
    }

    const providedKey = body.apiKey;

    if (!providedKey || typeof providedKey !== 'string') {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'apiKey is required and must be a string' }),
        { status: 400, headers: securityHeaders }
      );
    }

    if (!isValidApiKey(providedKey)) {
      return new Response(
        JSON.stringify({ error: 'Invalid API key format' }),
        { status: 400, headers: securityHeaders }
      );
    }

    // Constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks
    const storedKey = edgeConfig.API_KEY ?? DEFAULT_CONFIG.API_KEY;
    const isValid = constantTimeEqual(providedKey, storedKey);

    if (edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS?.enableLogging) {
      console.log(
        JSON.stringify({
          event: 'api_key_validation',
          valid: isValid,
          clientIp: maskSensitiveValue(clientIp, 3),
          timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
        })
      );
    }

    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        valid: isValid,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      { status: isValid ? 200 : 401, headers: securityHeaders }
    );
  }

  // Route: GET /features - Return feature flags only
  if (request.method === 'GET' && (pathname === '/features' || pathname === '/api/features')) {
    return new Response(
      JSON.stringify({
        featureFlags: edgeConfig.FEATURE_FLAGS,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
      }),
      { status: 200, headers: securityHeaders }
    );
  }

  // Default: 404
  return new Response(
    JSON.stringify({
      error: 'Not found',
      availableEndpoints: [
        'GET /config - View masked configuration',
        'GET /health - Health check',
        'GET /features - Feature flags',
        'POST /validate-key - Validate API key',
      ],
    }),
    { status: 404, headers: securityHeaders }
  );
}

// Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing attacks
function constantTimeEqual(a: string, b: string): boolean {
  if (a.length !== b.length) {
    // Still do a comparison to maintain constant time behavior
    // but we know the result will be false
    let result = 1;
    const maxLen = Math.max(a.length, b.length);
    for (let i = 0; i < maxLen; i++) {
      const charA = i < a.length ? a.charCodeAt(i) : 0;
      const charB = i < b.length ? b.charCodeAt(i) : 0;
      result |= charA ^ charB;
    }
    return false;
  }

  let result = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < a.length; i++) {
    result |= a.charCodeAt(i) ^ b.charCodeAt(i);
  }
  return result === 0;
}
